2026-04-20T08:11:14.6334244Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-04-20T08:11:14.6335235Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
2026-04-20T08:11:14.6336078Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GITHUB_SERVER_URL#https://}"[0m
